nasb.text: Choose wise and discerning and experienced men from your tribes, and I will appoint them as your heads.’

esv.text: Choose for your tribes wise, understanding, and experienced men, and I will appoint them as your heads.’

cnv.text: 你們要按著支派選出一些有智慧、有見識、有經驗的人，我就立他們作你們的首領。’

ccb.text: 你们要从各支派中选出有智慧、有见识、受尊重的人，我要立他们做你们的首领。’
